item.title: WorldSpeak 2026: Ignite Your Language Business at a Virtual Conference With a Great Speaker Lineup
item.description: Get ready to be part of the most dynamic gathering for companies in the Canadian language industry! WorldSpeak 2026, proudly hosted by the Canadian Language Industry Association (CLIA). Virtual conference discount available for GALA users inside. Continue Reading

item.title: Stay Alert to Phishing Emails Posing As GALA
item.description: We are aware of an increase in phishing and spoofing emails that appear to come from GALA. These messages may use familiar branding or language but are not sent by GALA staff and are designed to trick recipients into sharing personal information or moving conversations off secure channels. Continue Reading

item.title: Phrase Launches Verified Solutions Program to Strengthen its Ecosystem of Trusted Integrations
item.description: Phrase, a global leader in language intelligence technology, today announced the launch of its Verified Solutions program. This new initiative is designed to help customers build and scale their language technology stack using validated, best of breed solutions from across the Phrase ecosystem. Continue Reading

item.title: New Report Finds That Interpreting Technology Can Make Language Access More Reliable
item.description: Boostlingo’s State of Interpreting Technology 2026 Report, based on 370+ stakeholders, finds that language access is expanding but unreliable. Half report unmet interpreter needs. Rising operational complexity—not supply alone—drives gaps. AI interpreting is emerging, but effective orchestration acr Continue Reading

item.title: Creative Words and Webvisibility partner to support multilingual GEO strategies
item.description: Creative Words is pleased to announce its partnership with Webvisibility, an Italian search and web analytics agency specializing in digital visibility strategies, search marketing, and AI-powered search optimization. Continue Reading

item.title: LEO's 13th International Virtual Conference
item.description: Register for the upcoming conference on 25-26 June. This year’s theme, “We Are Here To Stay: The Irreplaceable Language Industry,” reflects the critical and evolving role of interpreters, translators, and all language professionals in today’s dynamic landscape. Early bird closes 30 April. Continue Reading

item.title: GALA Annual Survey 2026 Findings
item.description: Each year, GALA’s Annual Survey offers a candid look at how our community experiences the association. We find out what’s working well and where we must improve, and we gauge the community’s sentiments about the association and the value we create. Continue Reading

item.title: Call for Presentations for the Translating and the Computer Conference
item.description: AsLing invites submissions for the 47th edition of the Translating and the Computer Conference (TC47), to be held from 8 to 10 December 2026 in Luxembourg. Continue Reading

item.title: Digitaldrop and Adept Complete Merger to Accelerate "Borderless Digital Shift" in Global Marketing
item.description: We are pleased to announce that Digitaldrop Inc, and Adept Corporation have integrated our management resources to strengthen our business foundation and expand our service capabilities. We have re-started operations as the new “Digitaldrop Inc,". Continue Reading

item.title: Take the GALA The State of Localization in the Age of AI Survey
item.description: The aim is to understand the challenges and future directions the industry should take, as well as what GALA, as the world’s largest non-profit trade organization, can do to continue supporting its members while ensuring its own relevance during a period of apparent technological disruption. Continue Reading

item.title: Meeting the Moment
item.description: An update from Allison Ferch, GALA's Executive Director, on how GALA is evolving to meet the needs of our members and the localization industry. Continue Reading

item.title: Bylaws Amendments Approved by GALA Members
item.description: GALA members recently voted on four proposed amendments to the association’s bylaws. Each measure passed with strong support, receiving less than 10% opposition. A full report of the results is available here. The amendments were designed to streamline operations, strengthen governance, and... Continue Reading
